title: Salesforce India Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Salesforce India Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Salesforce India Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Gurgaon office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Salesforce India Ventures Solutions:
Salesforce India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Salesforce India Ventures Solutions!
